text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Navigator Programs * Drug Use Disorder Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues African American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Drug Use Disorder Issues Hispanic/Latino Community Homelessness Issues Native American Community Pregnant Individuals AIDS/HIV Issues Pregnant Individuals Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT MULTNOMAH COUNTY HARM REDUCTION CLINIC HARM REDUCTION CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers short-term care for individuals with skin, wound, and soft tissue infections. Provides HIV, hepatitis C, and syphilis testing. Other services include syringe exchange, Naloxone distribution, health insurance enrollment, and referral to community resources. 12425 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Primary focus is injection drug users, but anyone can request services Hours: Monday/Thursday 11am-5pm (503) 988-0577 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HARM REDUCTION CLINIC
